arts.ttl: On This Day: Watford FC mural unveiled in town centre subway
arts.sum: On this day in 2022, a new Watford FC mural was officially unveiled in the town centre subway under Exchange Road.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Watford v Norwich City
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate at Vicarage Road via our live matchday blog as Norwich City face Watford.

arts.ttl: 'We want a Watford way of playing and I want to be the person to create that'
arts.sum: The long-term vision is for there to be an agreed approach, for which players are then recruited.

arts.ttl: Joe Pateman: Why Josh Sargent has matured into the ideal centre forward
arts.sum: Norwich City's 5-1 rout of Swansea, while perhaps flattering, will have hopefully given Johannes Hoff Thorup’s men a much-needed confidence boost heading into today’s lunchtime clash with Watford at Vicarage Road, says fan columnist Joe Pateman.

arts.ttl: 'We're very fortunate' - Thorup, McLean and Doyle on defender's Norwich loan so far
arts.sum: Kenny McLean, Johannes Hoff Thorup and the man himself have all weighed in on Manchester City loanee Callum Doyle's Norwich City spell so far.

arts.ttl: Norwich boss outlines Crnac improvement plan
arts.sum: The right balance between game time and training is the key to improvement for Norwich City's Ante Crnac, according to Johannes Hoff Thorup.

arts.ttl: Watford close to landing Premier League man ahead of other clubs
arts.sum: Watford are close to landing Chelsea left-back Caleb Wiley on loan, according to The Athletic. Watford are poised… The post Watford close to landing Premier League man ahead of other clubs appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Player has signed contract with Watford – Only official announcement from Hornets missing
arts.sum: Over the past two days, Watford made concrete advances to sign Udinese goalkeeper Egil Selvik in the winter market. Earlier this month, the Italian club signed him from FK Haugesund, and Watford made an approach to sign him on a permanent transfer in this window. Watford were waiting for the 27-year-old’s approval, which they already The post Player has signed contract with Watford – Only official announcement from Hornets missing appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea youngster Caleb Wiley set to join Championship side Watford until the end of the season - after Blues cut short Strasbourg loan
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The American has been on loan at the Blues' sister club Strasbourg for the first half of the campaign, where he has made just six appearances.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Caleb Wiley set to join Watford as Strasbourg loan is terminated
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Chelsea defender Caleb Wiley (20) is set to join Watford on loan until the end of the season. The American international has been on loan at Strasbourg for…
